Should flag

Invitation protocol

"The Future Is Admitted"

Repeated tracked labels carry the hierarchy instead of a stronger structure.

Preview sequence

"A Private Rehearsal"

The same scaffolding appears again before another section heading.

Access window

"Reviewed, Not Sold"

The pattern is now the page's default section grammar.

Material briefing

"Touch the Future"

Four repeated kickers should be enough to flag the page-level smell.

Should pass

Home / Journal

"Breadcrumb Before Heading"

Home

"Form Heading Is Separate"

  1. Step 01

    "Step Indicator"

    Step indicators in ordered flows should not count as section scaffolding.

Lowercase label

"Normal Case Kicker"

Not uppercase, not the repeated AI section-label pattern.

Archive code

"Intentional Brand Label"

Deliberate brand systems can opt out with an explicit marker.
